Updated 12/01/2002

Local Hotels
There are several hotels within walking distance of the UC Berkeley Campus.

The Hotel Shattuck Plaza
2086 Allston Way
Berkeley, CA 94704
(Corner of Shattuck Avenue and Allston Way)
1-510-845-7300
1-510-845-7320 fax
Rates from $59 +tax per night

The Hotel Durant
2600 Durant
Berkeley, CA 94704
1-510-845-8981
Rates from $119 +tax per night

The Claremont Resort and Spa
41 Tunnel Road
Berkeley, CA 94705
1-510-843-3000 main
1-800-551-7266 reservations
